title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Parle Products

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Parle Products
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
